'''lahasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kvutza|kvutza]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-h-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kvutza|kvutza]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lahasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læhæshæth|læhæshæth]] || [[word:læhæshæj|læhæshæj]] || [[word:læhæshæsh|læhæshæsh]] || [[word:læhæshæ|læhæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lahahashath|lahahashath]] || [[word:lahahashaj|lahahashaj]] || [[word:lahahashash|lahahashash]] || [[word:lahahasha|lahahasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lahashath|lahashath]] || [[word:lahashaj|lahashaj]] || [[word:lahashash|lahashash]] || [[word:lahasha|lahasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lahafshath|lahafshath]] || [[word:lahafshaj|lahafshaj]] || [[word:lahafshash|lahafshash]] || [[word:lahafshaf|lahafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lahashatha|lahashatha]] || [[word:lahashaja|lahashaja]] || [[word:lahashasha|lahashasha]] || [[word:lahashaka|lahashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lahashath|lahashath]] || [[word:lahashaj|lahashaj]] || [[word:lahashash|lahashash]] || [[word:lahasha|lahasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lahashathal|lahashathal]] || [[word:lahashajal|lahashajal]] || [[word:lahashashal|lahashashal]] || [[word:lahashakal|lahashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lahashathatha|lahashathatha]] || [[word:lahashajaja|lahashajaja]] || [[word:lahashashasha|lahashashasha]] || [[word:lahashaka|lahashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lahashathan|lahashathan]] || [[word:lahashajan|lahashajan]] || [[word:lahashashan|lahashashan]] || [[word:lahashakan|lahashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lahashathaoro|lahashathaoro]] || [[word:lahashajaoro|lahashajaoro]] || [[word:lahashashaoro|lahashashaoro]] || [[word:lahashakaoro|lahashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
